title: Kitsu's Forgecraft
description: Welcome to Smithing and Forging tools, weapons, armor, and tech
body:
The goal of ForgeCraft is to provide players a close to the real thing Blacksmithing mod as well as world experiences to use the tools and items in. The mod adds forging of iron ore into ingots via different historically accurate methods. Forging of tools via anvil and hammer. Movement of hot items through tools.

Dependent Mods: PrimalCore

This mod is allowed for use by default in modpacks unless otherwise denied. Modpacks that are denied will be listed here.
 
https://youtu.be/8q0qziqTres
